description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image and set the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define three stages: build, test, and package. In the build stage add a build job that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle and runs gradle --build-cache build, using a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME that pulls the build and .gradle directories. In the test stage add a test job that uses the same cache and executes gradle check jacocoTestReport followed by cat server/build/reports/jacoco/test/html/index.html. In the package stage add package-client and package-server jobs that run only on master and develop branches, use the same cache, run gradle :client:distZip and gradle :server:distZip respectively, and publish artifacts from client/build/distributions/ and server/build/distributions/ with artifact names ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, untracked true, when on_success.
